query:
-- Check octane_customer_links for Zambrero sites
SELECT ocl.serviceId, ocl.serviceName, ocl.octaneCustomerId, ocl.internalCustomerExternalId,
       c.name as customerName
FROM octane_customer_links ocl
LEFT JOIN customers c ON ocl.internalCustomerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE ocl.serviceName LIKE '%Zambrero%' OR ocl.octaneCustomerId = '528133'
ORDER BY ocl.serviceName
LIMIT 20;
